Operation 'showMetadata' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about what metadata is returned and the structure of the response. Summary is vague about the filtering mechanism. Improved version specifies the input parameter (media ID), the response schema (MediaMetadataResource), and clarifies the retrieval action for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Show media metadata filtered by the media id
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve media metadata by media ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves extracted metadata for a specific media resource identified by media ID. Returns a MediaMetadataResource object containing the stored metadata attributes. Supports filtering by media ID parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what metadata is returned and the structure of the response. Summary is vague about the filtering mechanism. Improved version specifies the input parameter (media ID), the response schema (MediaMetadataResource), and clarifies the retrieval action for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createMetadata' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain what inputs are expected or what is returned. Missing details about the request body structure, response format, and the side effect of persisting data. Improved version specifies the input schema (MediaMetadataBody), output schema (MediaMetadataResource), HTTP status code, and clarifies the persistence action for AI agents to understand the operation's full lifecycle.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new media metadata resource by accepting a MediaMetadataBody request containing extracted metadata attributes. Returns the created MediaMetadataResource object with a 201 status code. The operation persists the metadata to the store and makes it available for subsequent retrieval operations.
